title: GAP India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GAP India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!
